answer:
<think> I would need to know which base the 904th Expeditionary Air Refueling Squadron was last assigned to in order to find out when that base closed. Let's assume I have that information available. </think>
<answer> The year the base closed </answer>

For example:
<think> The 904th Expeditionary Air Refueling Squadron was last assigned to McChord Air Force Base. I need to find out when McChord Air Force Base closed. </think>
<answer> \boxed{2011} (Assuming McChord Air Force Base closed in 2011)
